name: autonomousqa
description: AI-powered autonomous QA engine — Zero-Touch, Zero-Script, Zero-Compromise

scripts.dev: echo 'Run each service individually — see README.md'
scripts.db:migrate: cd gateway && npx prisma db push
scripts.install:all: cd gateway && npm install && cd ../autonomousqa-frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && timeout /t 5 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
